description: The presentation discusses the expansion of Automated Market Maker (AMM) design space on Solana, focusing on user benefits, capital efficiency, and risk management. It introduces two mechanisms: market making beyond constant function equations and interconnected markets, highlighting the importance of avoiding stale orders and impermanent loss.
topic_summary: Exploration of AMM design space on Solana, emphasizing user-centric protocols and innovative market making mechanisms [t=3:00].
